title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bajaj Auto Global Group - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bajaj Auto Global Group - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Bajaj Auto Global Group in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Auto Global Group:
Bajaj Auto Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Auto Global Group!
